title: lasianthera africana var. microphylla
intro: Lasianthera africana var. microphylla, also known as a small-leaved variant of the Lasianthera africana plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lasianthera africana var. microphylla include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems and improving overall well-being. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote health and wellness.
